summary.intent: Fix review comments on PR #540 (model list UX improvements) and resolve the review conversations.
summary.outcome: Both review comments were addressed: localized hardcoded strings in onboarding-view.js using t() and fixed JSDoc in helpers.js; changes were committed after biome formatting.

repo: Localization uses a t() helper imported from i18n — all user-visible strings must go through t(), not hardcoded English.
Biome is used as the formatter/linter and must be run on changed JS files before committing.

code.finding: Hardcoded English string replaced with t() call for localization; t is already imported from i18n in this file.
JSDoc was inaccurate regarding date suffixes becoming the sort key — updated to reflect actual behavior.

workflow: PR review comments are fetched via gh CLI before making fixes.
Resolving conversations after fixing is a distinct step from committing the code changes.
local-validate.sh script exists for pre-merge validation: ./scripts/local-validate.sh <pr-number>.

open_items: Final validation pass with ./scripts/local-validate.sh 540 was suggested but not confirmed as completed.
PR #540 still needs merge after review conversations are resolved.
